query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `kb_sharing_permissions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `owner_id` int NOT NULL,
  `grantee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `grantee_type` enum('professional','manager','organization','admin') NOT NULL,
  `topic` enum('insurance','investments','tax','estate','retirement','debt','budgeting','real_estate','business','education','health_finance','general','all') NOT NULL,
  `access_level` enum('none','summary','read','contribute','full') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'read',
  `source` enum('default','user_set','professional_request','admin_override') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',
  `is_active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `granted_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `revoked_at` bigint,
  `expires_at` bigint,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `kb_sharing_defaults` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `relationship_type` enum('financial_advisor','insurance_agent','tax_professional','estate_attorney','accountant','mortgage_broker','real_estate_agent','other') NOT NULL,
  `topic` enum('insurance','investments','tax','estate','retirement','debt','budgeting','real_estate','business','education','health_finance','general','all') NOT NULL,
  `default_access_level` enum('none','summary','read','contribute','full') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'read',
  `rationale` text
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `kb_access_transitions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `owner_id` int NOT NULL,
  `from_grantee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `to_grantee_id` int NOT NULL,
  `topic` enum('insurance','investments','tax','estate','retirement','debt','budgeting','real_estate','business','education','health_finance','general','all') NOT NULL,
  `previous_access_level` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `new_access_level` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `reason` enum('client_switched','professional_left','org_change','manual','expired') NOT NULL,
  `transitioned_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `transitioned_by` int NOT NULL
);

-- Seed smart defaults for each relationship type
INSERT INTO `kb_sharing_defaults` (`relationship_type`, `topic`, `default_access_level`, `rationale`) VALUES
-- Financial Advisor: broad access
('financial_advisor', 'investments', 'read', 'Core competency - needs full visibility into investment portfolio'),
('financial_advisor', 'retirement', 'read', 'Retirement planning is central to financial advisory'),
('financial_advisor', 'insurance', 'summary', 'Needs awareness of insurance coverage for holistic planning'),
('financial_advisor', 'tax', 'summary', 'Tax implications affect investment strategy'),
('financial_advisor', 'estate', 'summary', 'Estate planning intersects with wealth management'),
('financial_advisor', 'debt', 'read', 'Debt management affects overall financial health'),
('financial_advisor', 'budgeting', 'read', 'Cash flow is fundamental to financial planning'),
('financial_advisor', 'general', 'summary', 'General context helps personalize advice'),
-- Insurance Agent: insurance-focused
('insurance_agent', 'insurance', 'read', 'Core competency - needs full insurance details'),
('insurance_agent', 'health_finance', 'read', 'Health costs directly relate to insurance needs'),
('insurance_agent', 'estate', 'summary', 'Life insurance intersects with estate planning'),
('insurance_agent', 'investments', 'none', 'Not relevant to insurance advisory role'),
('insurance_agent', 'general', 'summary', 'General context for personalization'),
-- Tax Professional: tax-focused
('tax_professional', 'tax', 'read', 'Core competency - needs full tax details'),
('tax_professional', 'investments', 'read', 'Investment gains/losses affect tax liability'),
('tax_professional', 'real_estate', 'read', 'Property taxes and deductions'),
('tax_professional', 'business', 'read', 'Business income and deductions'),
('tax_professional', 'retirement', 'summary', 'Retirement contributions affect tax planning'),
('tax_professional', 'insurance', 'none', 'Not relevant to tax advisory'),
-- Estate Attorney: estate-focused
('estate_attorney', 'estate', 'read', 'Core competency - needs full estate details'),
('estate_attorney', 'insurance', 'read', 'Life insurance is key estate planning tool'),
('estate_attorney', 'real_estate', 'read', 'Property is major estate asset'),
('estate_attorney', 'investments', 'summary', 'Investment accounts need beneficiary review'),
('estate_attorney', 'business', 'summary', 'Business succession planning'),
('estate_attorney', 'tax', 'summary', 'Estate tax implications'),
-- Accountant: financial records focused
('accountant', 'tax', 'read', 'Core competency - tax preparation'),
('accountant', 'budgeting', 'read', 'Bookkeeping and cash flow'),
('accountant', 'business', 'read', 'Business accounting'),
('accountant', 'investments', 'summary', 'Investment income reporting'),
('accountant', 'debt', 'read', 'Liability tracking'),
-- Mortgage Broker: real estate focused
('mortgage_broker', 'real_estate', 'read', 'Core competency - property financing'),
('mortgage_broker', 'debt', 'read', 'Existing debt affects mortgage qualification'),
('mortgage_broker', 'budgeting', 'read', 'Income verification and affordability'),
('mortgage_broker', 'investments', 'summary', 'Assets for down payment/reserves'),
('mortgage_broker', 'insurance', 'none', 'Not relevant to mortgage advisory'),
-- Real Estate Agent: property focused
('real_estate_agent', 'real_estate', 'read', 'Core competency - property transactions'),
('real_estate_agent', 'budgeting', 'summary', 'Budget awareness for property search'),
('real_estate_agent', 'investments', 'none', 'Not relevant to real estate transactions'),
-- Other: minimal defaults
('other', 'general', 'summary', 'Basic context for any advisory relationship');
